title: BITPOINT Forms Quad-Party Alliance to Integrate DVT for Institutional Ethereum Staking
tags: SBI Crypto HackedSBI Crypto, which operates a crypto asset mining business overseas, has confirmed the unauthorized leakage of crypto assets. The company is currently conducting an investigation to determine the cause and the amount of the outflow, but it is believed that the impact on its consolidated financial results will be minor.Japan FinTech ObserverNorbert Gehrke
